authorities.name: U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Virgin River and Muddy (Moapa) River systems: Open year around. Daily: 5 trout, 6 black bass, 25 catfish, 15 crappie, and 20 striped bass. No limit on other game fish. Possession: 10 trout, 12 black bass, 50 catfish, 30 crappie, and 40 striped bass. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Fishing the Muddy River in Southern Nevada from Overton to Lake Mead — Country Hookers
sources.quotedText: Anglers can expect to find largemouth, smallmouth, carp, and possibly some striped bass, with the occasional catfish lurking in the muddy waters. Rainbow trout can also sometimes be found in the cooler months.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 857477, "Muddy River", Stream, NV, Clark Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":857477,"gaz_name":"Muddy River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"NV","county_name":"Clark"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -12773263.0673, 4402577.1394) converts to lon -114.74417, lat 36.73748 (matches Wikipedia infobox coordinate for Muddy River, NV, which cites the same GNIS ID). The file previously recorded -114.4844, 36.5989 (roughly 25 km southeast, near the Overton/Lake Mead area), which does not match the GNIS point; corrected to the GNIS coordinate at the river's spring-fed origin near Moapa Valley.

regulations.humanSummary: The Muddy (Moapa) River is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: Per-species daily limits: 5 trout, 6 black bass, 25 catfish, 15 crappie, and 20 striped bass; no limit on other game fish. Per-species possession limits: 10 trout, 12 black bass, 50 catfish, 30 crappie, and 40 striped bass.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Clark County (Virgin River and Muddy (Moapa) River systems)
regulations.humanSummary: Daily: 5 trout, 6 black bass, 25 catfish, 15 crappie, 20 striped bass (no limit on other game fish). Possession: 10 trout, 12 black bass, 50 catfish, 30 crappie, 40 striped bass.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 5 trout, 6 black bass, 25 catfish, 15 crappie, and 20 striped bass. No limit on other game fish. Possession: 10 trout, 12 black bass, 50 catfish, 30 crappie, and 40 striped bass.

parameters.note: Fishing is permitted any hour of the day or night on the Muddy (Moapa) River, per NDOW's Clark County regulation table.

regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed any hour of the day or night on the Muddy (Moapa) River.
regulations.verbatimText: Any hour of the day or night

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
